Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 1 

Variable Details 

This section of the codebook contains one entry for each variable in the annual demographic and eligibility (DE) file. 
Each entry contains variable details to facilitate understanding and use of the variables.
